svg.title: SC Core ecosystem diagram
svg.desc: Full ecosystem diagram showing the flow from domain and infrastructure through nodes, merchants, coins and verification back to the community treasury

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Cloudflare Tunnel work for SC Core?')
sendPrompt('What does Cloudflare Tunnel do in the SC ecosystem?')
sendPrompt('How is the community dashboard hosted?')
sendPrompt('How does Blink Lightning wallet integrate with SC Core?')

svg.text: Node network — 3 Raspberry Pi nodes, each held by a community keyholder

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does each SC Core node do?')
sendPrompt('How do the three nodes replicate with Litestream?')
sendPrompt('Can a node move location and stay active?')
sendPrompt('What does the mint operator do in SC Core?')
sendPrompt('What does the SC admin control panel do?')
sendPrompt('Explain the three treasury wallet structure in SC Core')
sendPrompt('How does the Sunmi V2S terminal work in the merchant flow?')
sendPrompt('How does the merchant Blink Lightning wallet work?')
sendPrompt('Explain the sweep process from merchant wallet to treasury')
sendPrompt('What is a sleeper coin and how does the pre-launch system work?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the coin minting process')
sendPrompt('How does a holder verify a coin by tapping it?')
sendPrompt('How does the LNURL redemption flow work?')

svg.text: Physical coin — 40mm recycled plastic · NTAG213 NFC tag

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the PlasticCoin denomination colour standard')
sendPrompt('How does NFC verification work on a coin?')
sendPrompt('How does optical PUF verification work?')
sendPrompt('What is the mint mark on a PlasticCoin?')
sendPrompt('What does the community dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does Proof of Reserves work for PlasticCoin?')
sendPrompt('How does the local economy benefit from PlasticCoin?')
